touches.subject: We build systems that save you hours (case study inside)
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, I noticed you’re optimizing workflows at {{company}}. We help teams like yours automate Excel-heavy tasks and deploy reliable dashboards fast. Here’s a quick case study showing how we cut reporting time by 60%. Are you open to a 15-min call this week? Best, John

touches.text: Hi {{name}} — quick note from a builder who helps automate Excel-heavy tasks. Happy to share a brief case study.
Hi {{name}}, it’s John. Quick note: we help teams automate manual reporting in 1-2 days. Available for a 10-min chat this week?

touches.subject: Case study: 60% faster reporting at {{company}}
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, sharing the case study link. If it resonates, we can map a 90-min session to scope next steps. Are you free for a call? - John

touches.text: Following up on the quick case study. If there’s value, I can share a tailored blueprint for {{company}}.

touches.subject: Fast-path proposal for {{company}}
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, here’s a 3-tier proposal focusing on quick wins and long-term automation. Would you like me to send a lightweight scope?

touches.text: John here again. Want to lock a 15-min discovery call to see if this matches your goals?
Last try: I can draft a tailored plan for {{company}} and share it if you’re open to a quick chat.
